title: Phone stays *off* until 9am
body: The first hour sets your tone. Protect it from notifications, emails, and other people's agendas.

title: Move your body *first*
body: Even 15 minutes of walking clears brain fog. Exercise before screens gives you energy that coffee never will.

title: Write three *intentions*
body: Not a to-do list. Three things that would make today meaningful. Focus on outcomes that matter, not busywork.

title: Eat the *frog* early
body: Your hardest task gets your best energy. Do it before 10am. Everything after feels easy by comparison.

title: Batch your *meetings*
body: No meetings before noon. Protect your creative hours fiercely. Meetings expand to fill any gap you give them.

title: What's the *one* habit that changed everything for you?
subtitle: Drop it in the comments
